a.xlink:title: High-level wrapper for Vulkan instance and device.
Manages Vulkan resources (buffers, images, samplers) for the graphics backend.
Manages Vulkan instance creation and validation layers.
Manages Vulkan physical device selection and logical device creation.
Stores indices of queue families we need.
System-wide configuration for visual stream processing.
Resource limits and budgets for graphics subsystem.
Manages Vulkan command pools and command buffers.
